labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Contains bail!("No valid search paths given.") inside run() after search_paths() returns empty.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Defines search_paths() on Opts, which parses the path arguments checked before the bail!.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: SizeFilter::from_string() formats the exact string: "'{}' is not a valid size constraint. See 'fd --help'."

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Passes --size argument strings to SizeFilter::from_string() during CLI parsing.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines SizeFilter enum (Max/Min/Equals), SI/binary prefix constants, from_string(), parse_opt(), and applies_to().

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Re-exports SizeFilter via pub use self::size::SizeFilter; — the import path used by the rest of the crate.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Stores Vec<SizeFilter> in the Config struct's size_constraints field.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Parses --size arguments into SizeFilter instances via SizeFilter::from_string during Opts construction.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines pub enum WorkerResult (Entry(DirEntry) | Error(ignore::Error)), constructs both variants in the parallel worker closure, and receives them in the receiver thread.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Imports WorkerResult and processes Entry variants when --exec / --exec-batch commands are run.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines CommandSet struct, ExecutionMode enum, and CommandSet::new / new_batch / run methods.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Stores Option<CommandSet> in the Config struct's command field.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Calls CommandSet::new / new_batch from CLI options and wires it into Config.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Defines --exec and --exec-batch arguments and builds raw command token lists consumed by CommandSet.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines print_entry, print_entry_colorized, print_entry_uncolorized, and print_entry_format — the full output rendering pipeline.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Config holds ls_colors, null_separator, path_separator, strip_cwd_prefix, and format that print_entry reads to decide colorization and formatting.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines FileTypes struct (files/directories/symlinks/…/executables_only/empty_only bools) and should_ignore() which applies them.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Module boundary that re-exports SizeFilter, TimeFilter, and OwnerFilter, the complementary filter types used alongside FileTypes.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Stores FileTypes in Config.file_types and the other filter vecs that the walk applies together.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Implements the entire parallel walk: WalkParallel construction, the worker closure that sends WorkerResults, BatchSender, the receiver thread buffering/streaming loop, and output ordering.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Calls walk::scan() with the built Config and regex set, providing the top-level entry point.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines TimeFilter enum (Before/After) with from_str, before(), after(), and applies_to() methods; parses humantime durations, RFC 3339 dates, and Unix timestamps.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Stores Vec<TimeFilter> in Config.time_filters; applies_to is called per-entry during the walk.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines the Config struct with all search options: case sensitivity, ignore rules, depth limits, thread count, file type, size/time filters, command, format, output options.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Receives Arc<Config> in scan() and reads many fields (ignore_hidden, follow_links, threads, file_types, size_constraints, time_filters, etc.) throughout the walk loop.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Receives &Config in print_entry and reads ls_colors, null_separator, path_separator, strip_cwd_prefix, format.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Constructs Config via construct_config from the parsed Opts and passes it as Arc<Config> to walk::scan.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines DirEntry (wrapping ignore::DirEntry or BrokenSymlink), and its methods: path, into_path, file_type, metadata, style, stripped_path.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Creates DirEntry::normal and DirEntry::broken_symlink in the worker closure; calls path/file_type in the filter logic.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Receives &DirEntry in print_entry and calls path, file_type, and style methods for rendering.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Calls entry.file_type() and entry.path().executable() in should_ignore to classify entries.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines FormatTemplate struct and Token enum (Placeholder, Basename, Parent, NoExt, BasenameNoExt, Text); implements generate() and the AhoCorasick-based parser.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Calls config.format.as_ref().map(|fmt| print_entry_format(…)) to render results through FormatTemplate.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: CommandTemplate uses FormatTemplate (via fmt::Token) internally to expand {} placeholders in --exec command strings.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Stores Option<FormatTemplate> in Config.format; constructed in main.rs from --format arg.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines OwnerFilter struct, Check<T> helper enum, and from_string() which resolves uid/gid via nix. Unix-only (#[cfg(unix)] is on the module).

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Stores #[cfg(unix)] Option<OwnerFilter> in Config; applies filter in the walk loop.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Defines the --owner flag (unix-only) and passes its string value to OwnerFilter::from_string.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Owns the full flow: Opts::parse → construct_config → build RegexSet → call walk::scan; also handles exit codes from scan results.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Defines Opts struct parsed at the top of run(); provides search_paths and the raw flag values that construct_config reads.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Receives Config and the regex set from main, drives WalkParallel, filters entries, calls output::print_entry in the receiver thread.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Config is the data-transfer object built in main.rs and consumed by walk.rs and output.rs throughout the pipeline.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Called from the receiver thread in walk.rs to print each matched entry; the terminal end of the pipeline.
